name: smart-router-pipeline
description: Intelligent routing pipeline that classifies user intent (code review, chart analysis, or snap-eval analysis) and delegates to the appropriate skill. Uses keyword matching + optional LLM classification. Works with any Clarifai-hosted LLM/VLM.

parameters.name: user_prompt
parameters.description: Natural-language prompt describing what the user wants. Used for intent classification.

ui_hints.placeholder: Review my Python code for bugs and security issues

parameters.name: model_url
parameters.description: Clarifai model URL — used as LLM (code review), VLM (chart analysis), and for intent classification fallback.

parameters.name: repo_url
parameters.description: Git repository URL to clone and review (triggers code review skill)

parameters.name: code_text
parameters.description: Raw Python code to review inline (triggers code review skill)

parameters.name: review_strictness
parameters.description: Code review strictness level

parameters.name: image_url
parameters.description: URL of chart/graph image to analyze (triggers chart analysis skill)

parameters.name: image_base64
parameters.description: Base64-encoded chart image (triggers chart analysis skill)

parameters.name: image_path
parameters.description: Local file path to chart image (triggers chart analysis skill)

parameters.name: analysis_type
parameters.description: Chart analysis type

parameters.name: output_format
parameters.description: Output format for chart analysis

parameters.name: additional_context
parameters.description: Extra context about the chart (domain, metrics, units)

parameters.name: csv_path
parameters.description: Local path to eval results CSV file (triggers snap-eval skill)

parameters.name: csv_url
parameters.description: URL to download eval results CSV (triggers snap-eval skill)

parameters.name: csv_text
parameters.description: Raw CSV string with eval results (triggers snap-eval skill)

parameters.name: failure_threshold
parameters.description: Absolute-error threshold in seconds — predictions with error above this are classified as failures

parameters.name: top_n_worst
parameters.description: Number of worst predictions to include in the report

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: Git branch for code review

parameters.name: file_patterns
parameters.description: Glob patterns for Python files to review

parameters.name: inference_params
parameters.description: JSON string with model inference parameters

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Clarifai user ID

parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: Clarifai app ID

parameters.name: save_results
parameters.description: Persist results to Clarifai
